flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Parkland College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Parkland College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (57.4% → 69.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Parkland College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 (21.6% → 26.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Parkland College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.9k → $13.3k).
